name: internal-sites-template
description: Deploy internal static sites behind Cloudflare Access with Workers for Platforms and D1.

ACCOUNT_ID.description: Your Cloudflare account ID. Find it in the Cloudflare dashboard account overview.

DISPATCH_NAMESPACE_API_TOKEN.description: API token with **Account: Workers Scripts: Edit** permission for the account that owns the dispatch namespace.

SITE_DOMAIN.description: Domain used for internal site URLs, for example `internal.example.com`. Configure routes for `/deploy` and `*.internal.example.com/*`.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
